top_signals.title: Reeves drops push for food price cap after retail backlash
top_signals.summary: Treasury’s effort to get UK supermarkets to agree on voluntary price controls struggles to find support
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: 'Large Deals Are In the Offing': Orszag
top_signals.summary: Peter Orszag, CEO of Lazard, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." NextEra Energy’s $67 billion deal for Dominion Energy vaults Lazard several steps up in the closely watched Wall Street league tables. The deal shores up Lazard’s long-time reputation as a go-to adviser on big deals.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: UK confirms Gulf trade deal in boost for service industries
top_signals.summary: Government estimates that agreement could boost economy by up to £3.7bn a year in ‘long run’

top_signals.title: City of London Nocturne return to see fan zone bonanza
top_signals.summary: Britain’s biggest festival might take place in a field in Somerset, but we are proud to be bringing the festival atmosphere to the heart of the capital with the return of the City of London Nocturne. Cycling fans get the chance to see some of the world’s best on two wheels in action, but even [...]
